reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of language-only optimization and social signaling, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links search-representation error, mathematical discovery limits, and public courage signaling under one fallibilist warning.
falsifiable_why: Could be undermined by systems showing reliable reality-tracking from language-only loops across mathematically demanding domains.
explanation: Polished language and public signals can outcompete truth when evaluative loops lack direct reality contact.
